name: flux-os
description: FLUX OS — Pure C intelligently hardware-agnostic operating system. Kernel-up autonomous development platform with FLUX bytecode VM, self-compiler, and A2A agent runtime.

name: flux-runtime
description: FLUX — Fluid Language Universal eXecution: A self-assembling, self-improving runtime for agent-first code. Polyglot markdown → bytecode → VM with adaptive optimization, fractal hot-reload, and self-evolution.

name: flux-runtime-c
description: FLUX Runtime — Fluid Language Universal eXecution. C11 rewrite of the Python Micro-VM bytecode interpreter with 100+ opcodes, A2A protocol, SIMD, and zero dependencies.
